/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/tests/audio_processor_test.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/media/AudioProcessor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/config/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/ffmpeg/CommandRunner.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/ffmpeg/FFmpeg.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/utils/FileUtils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/audio-processor-test.dir/src/utils/Timer.cpp.o" -o audio-processor-test
